human_summary: Wave 1 and half of Wave 2 done. Bottom Sheet + Quick Log shipped. MoodPicker 90% wired — just needs rendering in QuickLog JSX. 5 commits pushed today. App runs clean, zero console errors.

uncommitted_files.notes: MoodPicker 90% wired. QuickLog needs MoodPicker rendered in JSX and mood reset on close.

current_task.description: Finish MoodPicker: render <MoodPicker selected={mood} onSelect={setMood} /> in QuickLog between tags and note. Reset mood in handleClose.
current_task.what_remains: Add MoodPicker JSX + reset mood in handleClose + build + commit + push

next_tasks: wave1-fab-weight: FAB font weight changes with practice hours (20min)
wave3-visual-grammar: Document how data maps to visual properties (45min)
wave3-temporal-resonance: Data model for mood, energy, schedule fields (60min)

build_gate.on_failure: git checkout . on failed files, log failure in session_log, move to next_task

panic_recovery.build_fails: git stash, move to next_task, leave note in session_log
panic_recovery.merge_conflicts: git checkout --theirs on conflicts, rebuild, note in session_log
panic_recovery.dirty_state_unclear: git diff > /tmp/river-rescue.patch && git checkout . && note patch location
